_SEARCH_FLOW_NOTE: Three-step AcclaimWeb (Telerik 2012). Identical to Brevard but: (1) GridResults requires X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequest or returns 500; (2) camelCase JSON keys 'data'/'total'; (3) Official Records BookType=1 (Brevard=3); (4) Deed DocType=26 (Brevard=80); (5) PDF endpoint is /Image/DocumentPdfAllPages/{TransactionItemId} — not WebAtalaCache.
apn_source: Lake County PA adapter (probe required — Lake CAMA portal TBD)
notes: Lake County FL Clerk of Court — OneCare / AcclaimWeb (Telerik 2012). Probed live 2026-06-18 (US datacenter, no CF). Key deltas vs Brevard: BookType OR=1, Deed DocType=26, GridResults needs XMLHttpRequest header, PDF = /Image/DocumentPdfAllPages/{txn_id}. LAURENCE BROWN shows 0 deed results under that exact name — may need to search by last name only ('BROWN') then filter itemValues by 'LAURENCE' prefix. Three test subjects: BROWN, RAMIREZ, BRAMLAGE (all from test_subjects.json).
